title: AI-LTC Context Schema
description: Compressed context format for cheap model input. Use this instead of full state.json when token budget is constrained.

progress.description: One-sentence summary of what has been accomplished this batch.

current_tasks.description: Only include tasks that are in_progress or blocked. Omit completed tasks.

blockers.description: One-line descriptions of active blockers. Omit if none.

next_action.description: The single most important next step.

model_role.description: Which role the current model is playing.
